stimulus:
Welcome!

In this study, you will play three short video games that were generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and complete a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"The beat based matching aspect was very creative although also somewhat challenging. I like the integration of damaging aspects from the colored orbs and that they differ. I do think it couldve been slightly more creative by adding some sort of special ability to the player orb.","originality-rating":3,"originality-free-response":"The mechanics were quite basic, as was the level design. I did like the different effects and movements the colored orbs made. I was originally surprised by them being able to deal damage to me, but then surprised once again by not \"losing\" when I got hit too much, just being stunned for a short while.","effectiveness-rating":4,"effectiveness-free-response":"The controls worked well, and the concept was quite appealing. The entertainment value is mediocre due to the relative simplicity of the concept. I was somewhat frustrated by the method of dealing damage, though this might be down moreso to my own ability.","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":3,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"It feels like a simple, but well executed game. Though simple, the controls work well and the movement is smooth and polished. For the same reasons it feels like there was personal effort put in to make it function as well as it does. "}

stimulus:
You have completed your evaluation of the first video game.

Press any key to proceed to the second game.

response: {"creativity-rating":3,"creativity-free-response":"The \"get to a goal together\" concept is not very original. Being tethered to eachother does add some originality, especially combined with a hp bar.","originality-rating":3,"originality-free-response":"The mechanics are rather basic, the controls will be familiar to most people, and the \"rules\" of the game are simple to figure out. The tether dealing damage when too close was original and surprising, as I was expecting it to do the opposite and deal damage when they were to far apart.","effectiveness-rating":2,"effectiveness-free-response":"The controls worked fine. Apart from that there was little explanation to the effect of the tether and the relevant consequences. The goal seemed to have a weird hitbox as it seemed to take multiple tries to hit it. The level design is quite bland and doesn't give the player anything to do or look at apart from the goal of the game. Alltogether, feels like an old flash game.","authenticity-rating":2,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":2,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"It was a mildly interesting idea, mostly because of the tether. Other than that there seemed to be little originality in the concept or level design. This also reflects to me that there was little personal effort put into this game as the level looks boring and the gameplay is quite bland."}

stimulus:

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"The concept of using specific bolded words to affect the levels is something I've rarely seen before. The level design apart from that doesn't have much going on, but it feels like this is intentional.","originality-rating":3,"originality-free-response":"The \"you're a box, get somewhere\" is a basic videogame premise (e.g geometry dash), and the controls are relatively simple. The theme doesn't have much other than a simple background and the black box structures. The aesthetic this creates does seem to fit with the intent though, so it doesn't subtract much from the game.","effectiveness-rating":4,"effectiveness-free-response":"The controls were smooth and the concept is fun. The effects of the bolded words were quite unclear, I originally thought they could be moved like platforms for you to stand on. After finding this was not the case I was still confused as I had used both words but still couldn't complete the level for a short while. Despite this I quite enjoyed the game, mostly due to the controls and creative concept.","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":4,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"It felt like an authentic concept with a basic framework. The smoothness of the gameplay shows the dev put personal effort into polishing the game. Especially because of the cube having bounce physics. Everything that happened in this game felt like it was intentional, just could've used a little more explanation."}
